title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that China holds a structural advantage over the US in powering AI data centers due to centralized energy policy and grid infrastructure, despite US dominance in chips, models, and applications. The analysis examines how US fragmentation across jurisdictions forces hyperscalers like Google, Meta, and OpenAI to pursue behind-the-meter and off-grid solutions, while China's Eastern Data Western Compute strategy and 25,000+ miles of ultra-high-voltage transmission lines enable rapid datacenter scaling.
